methodology.allergens: Strict-mode tagging: an allergen is flagged ONLY when an ingredient is unambiguously a source of that allergen (e.g., explicit wheat-based items for Gluten; explicit tree nuts for Nuts; wine/explicit sulphite-preserved/dried fruit for Sulphites). Trace/'may contain' signals and non-canonical cues (pickles, vinegar, balsamic, capers, dukkah, Worcestershire, corn tortilla, chicken sausage, falafel, hashbrowns) are NOT flagged. Recipes with no qualifying allergen ingredient use the sentinel allergens: ["NO_ALLERGENS"].
methodology.calories: Estimated from ingredient quantities using USDA/standard food composition per-100g values. Wastage not applied. Rounded to nearest integer. Estimates only — verify with lab testing for regulatory labeling.
methodology.wastage_pct: wastage_pct is stored as a decimal fraction (e.g. 0.05 = 5%)

changelog.entry: Moved bagel items from packaging[] to ingredients[] for recipes #13, #14, #15, #16, #31.
Re-derived allergens for bagel recipes (#13, #14, #15, #16, #31) — added Gluten for all bagels, added Sesame Seeds for sesame/plain-or-sesame bagels.
Recomputed calories_kcal for recipes #13, #14, #15, #16, #31 to include bagel contribution.
Built recipe #48 Hearty Protein Bowl from menu description (BOM, packaging matched to #22/#23, allergens, kcal). Cleared prior 'not yet defined' note.
Added pending_decisions array flagging Maple Syrup (Taste Basics Honey) identity, Hearty Protein Bowl BOM verification, and other slashed/ambiguous ingredient names.
Renamed "Maple Syrup (Taste Basics Honey)" -> "Maple Syrup" in recipes [18, 26, 27, 29, 42].
Recipe #11: renamed "Smoked Paprika / Aleppo Pepper" -> "Aleppo Pepper" (slashed-ingredient resolution).
Recipe #31: renamed "Jam / Honey (optional side)" -> "Jam (optional side)" (slashed-ingredient resolution).
Recipe #39: renamed "Chipotle Powder / Chipotle in Adobo" -> "Chipotle in Adobo" (slashed-ingredient resolution).
Recipe #10 Shakshuka rebuilt: split tomato base (Tomato Paste 15g + Peeled Tomato 120g); kcal 357->376.
Recipe #48 Hearty Protein Bowl rebuilt per Deliverect live listing + photo: cheddar->feta crumbled, added broccoli/cherry tomato/avocado/seasoned rice; kcal 674->738.
Recipe #43 renamed "Vanilla Classic Oats" -> "Apple Berry Oats" (drops Vanilla; matches actual BOM).

Generalized bagel ingredient names — bagel type is a customer modifier. Applied conservative Gluten+Sesame allergen declaration. Cleared Hearty Protein Bowl pending decision — spec confirmed by operator.

Re-tagged allergens across all recipes using new 16-tag cloud-kitchen aggregator taxonomy (Celery, Gluten, Crustaceans, Fish, Eggs, Lupin, Molluscs, Mustard, Nuts, Peanuts, Sesame, Soya, Sulphites, Sugared drink, Dairy, Lentils). Consolidated specific tree-nut/grain sub-tags into umbrella tags; removed Sulphites from items lacking explicit sulphite preservation.

Dial-back allergen re-tagging (strict 'essential only' rule): Sulphites removed from non-wine/non-sulphite-preserved/non-dried-fruit ingredients; Gluten no longer tagged for corn tortilla, hashbrowns, chicken sausage, or falafel (unless explicit); Nuts no longer tagged from dukkah; Mustard/Celery now explicit-only. Recipes with no qualifying allergen now carry ["NO_ALLERGENS"] sentinel.

changelog.change: Alignment fixes: Nutella flagged Dairy+Nuts; Granola flagged Gluten; Medjool Dates Sulphites removed.
